description: Force-finalization leak: five novel read calls exhaust max_iterations, and the forced no-tools complete() returns leaked tool-call JSON (a write payload). The _finalize_turn backstop suppresses it -- even the forced exit path cannot show raw JSON or execute the write. Provenance: U7 topology claim, pinned by tests/unit/test_agent_runtime.py::TestSoleEgressGate::test_forced_final_leaked_tool_call_is_suppressed. NOTE: completeness stays 'complete' -- the partial hedge applies only to non-fallback answers, so the leak fallback short-circuits it (see corpus README).
